title: Serverside Vein Miner and Treecapitator
description: A fabric based mod that adds customizable vein mining and a treecapitator.
body:
A lightweight, universal utility mod for Fabric that brings vein mining and tree felling to your world—no client-side install required.
Key Features:
- 4 Modes: Vein, Tree, Vein & Tree, and All Blocks.
- In-Game GUI: Open the menu with /VeinMiner to toggle settings.
- Smart Tree Felling: Chops entire trees (including leaves) with intelligent decay logic.
- Grief Protection: Built-in "Player-Placed" block tracking to protect your builds.
- Fully Configurable: Set max vein size, sneak-to-trigger, and custom block lists.
- Server-Side Only: Works in Singleplayer and Servers without players needing the mod.

Perfect for survival balancing and streamlining resource gathering.
